commands.review_summary:
The PR switches sandbox browser Docker probe timeout scheduling to captured Node timers and adds fake-timer/reset coverage for security audit and realtime websocket unit tests.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +20. Total +21 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The source path is clear from unit-fast isolate:false plus current-main global timer use in the Docker probe timeout, and the PR body gives a focused unit-fast command, though this read-only review did not rerun tests.
commands.review_followup: - No repair lane is needed because review found no actionable patch defect; the remaining action is maintainer review and CI handling for the maintainer-labeled PR.

target.title: fix(security): use real timers for docker probe timeouts
target.body:
## Summary
- Use captured Node timers for sandbox browser Docker probe timeouts so they still fire when `unit-fast` has Vitest fake timers active in another non-isolated test file.
- Cover the two sandbox browser timeout tests while fake timers are active.
- Keep the realtime websocket test timer reset and explicit test WebSocket `maxPayload` from the earlier failure in this same CI shard.

## CI Failure
`checks-node-core-fast` first failed in run 26666747372 job 78601680668 on `src/realtime-transcription/websocket-session.test.ts`. After that fix, runs 26667124321 job 78602838628 and 26667415910 job 78603695392 failed in `src/security/audit-sandbox-browser.test.ts` because its Docker probe timeout used mutable global timers.

Provenance: realtime timeout coverage was added in refs 7a2a31dede8 and tightened in refs 781c351439. Sandbox browser timeout coverage was added in refs f7c05dcc9e. The sandbox failure is made visible by the non-isolated `unit-fast` shard when fake timers are active while the Docker probe timeout awaits a real elapsed timeout.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit-fast.config.ts src/security/audit-sandbox-browser.test.ts src/realtime-transcription/websocket-session.test.ts --reporter=verbose` - passed, 2 files / 14 tests.
- `git diff --check` - passed.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode uncommitted` - passed.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: CI-only timeout hangs in timeout-sensitive core fast unit tests.
Real environment tested: local macOS checkout with repo Vitest unit-fast config.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused unit-fast Vitest command listed above.
Evidence after fix: both touched test files passed all 14 tests; sandbox browser timeout tests now pass with fake timers active.
Observed result after fix: Docker probe timeout bounds use real Node timers instead of mutable test globals.
What was not tested: full `checks-node-core-fast` locally; PR CI will run the full shard.
target.author: romneyda
